title: Forcepoint Agent Health and Enrollment Coverage (`forcepoint:one`)
dataSources: Forcepoint cloud SSE (`forcepoint:one`), on-prem Web Security (`websense:cg:kv`), Email (`forcepoint:email:kv`), DLP (`forcepoint:dlp`)
app: Forcepoint Insights SIEM App (Splunkbase 8053); Forcepoint Web Security TA (`websense:cg:kv`); Email Security KV (`forcepoint:email:kv`)
spl:
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-4h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)agent|endpoint")
| stats latest(status) as st latest(_time) as seen by hostname, agent_version
| where st!="healthy" OR seen < relative_time(now(),"-2h")
| sort seen
description: Agents off-patch or offline bypass web and DLP controls at the endpoint.
value: Endpoint teams hit coverage SLAs before audits.
implementation: Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

references.title: Splunk Add-on for Forcepoint Web Security

grandmaExplanation: We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.
cimSpl:
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Spikes from new SaaS rollouts, automated workflows, sanctioned bulk uploads, or M&A integration.
